label_source: Layer-1 resolve pattern cmp,vp,vpc,naive = _,W,L,_ : value_profile RESOLVES (W), value_profile_cmplog BLOCKS (L), cmplog + naive non-decisive. The two involved fuzzers (vp winner, vpc loser) share the SAME CMP_MAP gradient feedback; the only technique delta is that vpc ALSO runs the I2S input-to-state substitution mutator. The shape's Layer-1 attribution is therefore 'adding I2S to a VP gradient HURTS here' (vp-pro / vpc-anti). This test is the INDEPENDENT real-data verification (G2) of HOW value_profile's unburdened gradient out-resolves the I2S-burdened vpc on the nested 16-bit Devanagari codepoint switch.

round_history.round0_refuted: Bet the whole shape on scalar value-DISTANCE closure to the case constants (NEW value_distance_reached descriptor, rule distance_gap>=2). Arbiter returned UNMEASURABLE: the gate is NOT a fixed-offset scalar literal compare but a switch on buffer->cur(1).codepoint requiring the 0x0905-THEN-0x094X codepoint PAIR to be assembled at adjacent glyph indices (byte_signature=dispersed_multibyte, variable glyph index). A residual-Hamming-to-one-operand metric mis-models an assembly/co-location gate. Dropped, not re-proposed.
round_history.round1_refuted: Pivoted to a corpus-CONTENT story: VP's unburdened gradient admits a corpus that physically CONTAINS more of the required codepoint tokens (joint_necessity analyze_pair, tag_lift/size_lift) and/or is byte-enriched for the codepoint bytes (operand_enrichment). BOTH hypotheses were SCORED (n_scorable=2) and BOTH rules FAILED (rule_not_met) -- the vp-resolving and vpc-blocking corpora carry the codepoint tokens/bytes roughly EQUALLY. EMPIRICAL FACT carried forward: the vp-advantage here is NOT a corpus-content difference.
round_history.round3_refuted: Pivoted to the corpus-SCALE channel the content null left open: the I2S substitution that vpc adds INFLATES and HOMOGENIZES vpc's saved corpus (corpus_size_ratio, rule corpus_size_ratio>=1.3 AND composition_entropy_ratio<0.85). The branch returned rule_not_met: vpc's saved corpus is indeed larger, but its byte-value Shannon entropy is NOT collapsed below 0.85x value_profile's -- the inflation is not entropy-homogenized in the way the gradient-dilution mechanism predicted. EMPIRICAL FACT carried forward: the vp-advantage is NOT demonstrably a corpus byte-entropy-homogenization effect either. Three channels are now empirically closed for this branch: scalar-distance (R0 unmeasurable), content (R1 nulled), corpus byte-scale/entropy (R3 nulled).
round_history.round4_terminal: Exhausted the BUILT toolset. The only untried built tool whose descriptor could touch this gate is depth_reach; but on W=value_profile-resolving vs L=value_profile_cmplog-blocking seeds it would re-measure 'the winner reaches the branch true side and the loser stalls on the false arm' -- which IS the resolve pattern that DEFINED the shape (winner avg hitcount 9 vs 0; loser line-68 F=17/F=18). That is G2-tautological (verifying vp-resolves WITH vp-resolves) and depth_reach's valid scope is the ctx/ngram iteration-DEPTH subtype, not a codepoint-pair-assembly switch. No G2-independent, G1-discriminating built measurement remains. The residual mechanism (per-execution I2S overhead/churn RATE) is forbidden by data_realities (I2S untagged in mutation_op, value_profile a feedback). HONEST G3 OUTCOME: this branch is non-discriminable with the available real-data toolset and falls to fallback:inconclusive.

hypotheses.label: NEW (R3) primary: the I2S substitution mutator that vpc adds INFLATES and HOMOGENIZES vpc's saved corpus relative to value_profile's -- vpc hoards far more saved seeds (corpus churn) whose byte composition is collapsed onto I2S-substituted patterns (lower Shannon byte-entropy). This corpus-SCALE dilution -- not a corpus-CONTENT deficit (R1 nulled content) and not a scalar value-distance gap (R0 unmeasurable) -- is the signature's own 'I2S overhead and corpus churn degrade the vpc gradient' mechanism, now observed as saved-corpus state (size + entropy), with NO lineage event required.

measurement.tool_mode: branch --winner-fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --loser-fuzzer value_profile : the tool's 'winner' = the arm hypothesized to inflate/homogenize, which HERE is the I2S-burdened LOSER of the shape (value_profile_cmplog). It is whole-corpus / branch-independent: --branch-id 6010 is accepted for the uniform arbiter CLI but only the harfbuzz value_profile_cmplog vs value_profile corpus pair matters.

params.scope: harfbuzz_6010 only. WHOLE-CORPUS comparison, no per-branch seeds needed -> NOT gated by the thin 3-seed resolving arm. harfbuzz IS in the on-disk corpus target set {curl,harfbuzz,openthread,sqlite3}. Verified on-disk: value_profile_cmplog median ~107k saved seeds vs value_profile median ~37k (ratio ~2.9) across trials 1-3.

hypotheses.prediction: corpus_size_ratio >= 1.3 AND composition_entropy_ratio < 0.85 : value_profile_cmplog's saved corpus is >=30% larger than value_profile's AND its byte-value Shannon entropy is collapsed below 85% of value_profile's (homogenized onto I2S-substituted byte patterns). DISCRIMINATING (G1): the two involved fuzzers run the IDENTICAL CMP_MAP gradient; the only delta is vpc's I2S substitution. (1) If adding I2S had NO corpus-scale effect (the alternative the signature's churn claim must beat), both corpora would be comparably sized with comparable byte-entropy -> corpus_size_ratio ~ 1.0 AND composition_entropy_ratio ~ 1.0. (2) This is ORTHOGONAL to the R1 content channel that ALREADY NULLED here (equal codepoint tokens/bytes): a content tool reads codepoint-token PRESENCE; this tool reads whole-corpus SIZE + byte-entropy, so a positive result is uniquely attributable to I2S churn diluting the gradient, NOT to a content advantage. EMPIRICAL OUTCOME (R3): the size half held (~2.9x) but the entropy half did NOT (composition_entropy_ratio NOT < 0.85) -> rule_not_met. The inflation is real but is not byte-entropy-homogenized; the churn mechanism is not demonstrated on saved-corpus state.

hypotheses.label: value_profile's UNBURDENED CMP_MAP gradient admits a corpus that physically CONTAINS more of the gate's required Devanagari codepoint tokens (the 0x0905 + 0x094X words) and/or is larger than the value_profile_cmplog-blocking corpus. The I2S substitution that vpc adds does not help place the adjacent-codepoint pair and its per-exec overhead/churn yields a token-POORER saved corpus. STRUCTURAL-ASSEMBLY / token-availability advantage, NOT scalar value-distance.

measurement.tool_mode: analyze_pair(winner_fz=value_profile, loser_fz=value_profile_cmplog) -- __WL_ has NO plain cmplog/naive decisive arm; the discriminating contrast is W=value_profile-resolving vs L=value_profile_cmplog-blocking, which the tool's analyze_pair mode emits as winner_tags/loser_tags/tag_lift/size_lift. NOT the 3-arm i2s_necessary mode (no cmplog blocking arm here).

tokens_by_target.harfbuzz_6010: the required little-endian Devanagari codepoint words for the nested switch at hb-ot-shaper-vowel-constraints.cc:68 -- the leading vowel 0x0905 (05 09 00 00) plus the cur(1) case constants {0x0946 (46 09 00 00), 0x0949 (49 09 00 00), 0x094A (4a 09 00 00), 0x094B (4b 09 00 00)}. Pass --tokens as these codepoint words; the token signal is the count of these adjacent-codepoint tokens present in a seed (the gate fires only when a 0x0905 word is immediately followed by one of the 0x094X words).

params.scope: ON-DISK CORPUS + SEEDS REQUIRED. DB-confirmed for harfbuzz_6010: resolving_seeds = value_profile x3, blocking_seeds = value_profile_cmplog x23 (verified in db/blockers.sqlite). harfbuzz IS in the on-disk corpus target set {curl,harfbuzz,openthread,sqlite3}. W=3 sits at the tool's >=3 minimum -- a thin winner arm; flagged in notes.

hypotheses.prediction: tag_lift = winner_tags - loser_tags >= 1.0 OR size_lift = winner_size/loser_size >= 1.3 : the value_profile-resolving seed set carries at least one MORE of the required adjacent codepoint tokens than the value_profile_cmplog-blocking set, and/or is >=30% larger. DISCRIMINATING (G1): both involved fuzzers run the IDENTICAL CMP_MAP gradient; the ONLY delta is vpc's added I2S substitution. (1) If the divergence were a scalar residual-distance effect, it would not show as whole-token PRESENCE/extent (round-0's distance metric already failed and was deemed unmeasurable here -- token-count is orthogonal). (2) If adding I2S were NEUTRAL for assembling this codepoint pair, the two gradient-equal corpora would place the codepoint tokens EQUALLY (tag_lift ~ 0 AND size_lift ~ 1.0) -- the NULL that the signature's 'I2S overhead/churn degrades the gradient' claim must beat. A positive tag_lift / size_lift in the vp-resolving direction is the signature uniquely attributable to the unburdened gradient admitting more-assembled corpus members. ALTERNATIVE RULED OUT: 'vpc assembles the same codepoints, just fewer trials reached the branch by chance' -> would show tag_lift ~ 0 AND size_lift ~ 1.0 (no systematic corpus-content difference). EMPIRICAL OUTCOME (R1): rule_not_met -- corpora carry the tokens roughly equally.

hypotheses.label: secondary / corroborant: the value_profile-resolving corpus is enriched for the target Devanagari codepoint bytes (vs decoy bytes) relative to the value_profile_cmplog-blocking corpus at the gate site, because near-miss codepoints register as new CMP_MAP coverage and steer the unburdened gradient's corpus toward the exact 0x0905/0x094X words.

measurement.tool_mode: winner_fz=value_profile (target=resolving corpus) vs loser_fz=value_profile_cmplog (decoy=blocking corpus). NOTE the tool's anchor is cmplog-vs-naive; here the W/L fuzzers differ, so it scores the vp-vs-vpc corpus byte-frequency contrast on the codepoint bytes.

params.scope: harfbuzz_6010 only. operand bytes = the low bytes of the codepoint words 0x0905 (05 09) and the case constants 0x0946/0x0949/0x094A/0x094B (46 09 / 49 09 / 4a 09 / 4b 09).
params.caveat: operand_enrichment is anchored at a FIXED gate offset; here the codepoints sit at VARIABLE glyph indices (byte_signature=dispersed_multibyte) and are SHORT (2-byte words -> width<=2 chance-alignment risk flagged by the tool). Treat as CORROBORANT ONLY; it does NOT stand alone as the verdict and is ranked below H1/H2.

hypotheses.prediction: signed_target_enrich > 0 AND signed_target_enrich > decoy_enrich : the value_profile-resolving corpus is enriched for the target codepoint bytes relative to decoy bytes vs the vpc-blocking corpus. DISCRIMINATING (G1): if adding I2S were neutral the two gradient-equal corpora would show signed_target_enrich ~ 0 (no systematic codepoint-byte difference). RULED OUT: chance co-occurrence of short 2-byte words -> would NOT exceed decoy_enrich (the >decoy_enrich clause guards the short-operand risk). EMPIRICAL OUTCOME (R1): rule_not_met -- corpora carry the codepoint bytes roughly equally.

undecidable.label: the PER-EXECUTION RATE half of the I2S-overhead claim: vpc spends fuzz cycles on I2SRandReplace substitutions, so each unit of wall-clock buys less gradient progress (an efficiency/rate claim, distinct from the corpus-STATE inflation/homogenization in H1).
undecidable.reason: The corpus-STATE manifestation of churn (inflation) IS measured by H1 (corpus_size_ratio); H1's entropy clause nulled in R3, so the byte-homogenization sub-claim is refuted, but the inflation observation stands. What REMAINS undecidable is the per-execution RATE/efficiency attribution: how many fuzz cycles I2S consumed and whether that, RATHER than the corpus state it produced, is what slowed the gradient. data_realities FORBID measuring this: I2S is NOT tagged in mutation_op (the havoc vocabulary is byte-identical across all 4 fuzzers -> no seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence 'I2S substitution event' or per-exec timing exists) and value_profile is a FEEDBACK invisible in lineage. The rate channel cannot be separated from the corpus-state channel with the available seed_set/lineage/exec_stats data; the per-exec-RATE attribution is left to fallback:inconclusive.

undecidable.label: NEW (R4) candidate, rejected as non-discriminable: value_profile's resolving corpus drives the nested vowel-constraint switch DEEPER / onto the true arm per seed (winner avg hitcount 9 vs 0; loser line-68 F=17/F=18), the only built tool (depth_reach) not yet applied to this branch.
undecidable.reason: depth_reach is REJECTED here on G2 (independence), not merely unbuilt. It runs the winner-RESOLVING vs loser-BLOCKING seeds through the cov image and reads the branch line's per-seed true-side vs blocked-side count. But those W/L seed sets were SELECTED by whether they resolve vs block the very branch line 68 -- so 'winner_deeper / winner reaches the true arm, loser stalls on the false arm' is TAUTOLOGICAL with the resolve pattern (_,W,L,_) that DEFINED the shape. Using it would be 'verifying vp-resolves WITH vp-resolves', the exact G2 violation the guardrail forbids. depth_reach's VALID scope (per its registry applies_to) is the ctx/ngram ITERATION-DEPTH subtype, where 'deeper per seed' means more loop iterations of a SINGLE structure -- not a one-shot codepoint-PAIR-assembly switch whose true/false side IS the resolve label. No G2-independent reading of depth_reach exists for this gate, so it cannot discriminate the I2S-churn mechanism from the bare resolve fact. Marked decidable:false rather than scored.

data_realities_respected: value_profile (CMP_MAP) is a FEEDBACK not a mutator -> NOT measured via any seed_lineage 'gradient event'. Its effect (and I2S's churn effect) is read off the corpus STATE the techniques produced -- whole-corpus size + byte-entropy (corpus_size_ratio), structural size + codepoint-token count (joint_necessity), codepoint-byte enrichment (operand_enrichment). All corpus-state computes; NO lineage event proposed.

I2S is NOT tagged in mutation_op -> NO seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence on an I2S substitution/overhead event proposed. H1 measures only the corpus STATE I2S produced (size+entropy), never an I2S 'event'; the per-EXEC-RATE attribution that WOULD need a lineage event is split off and marked decidable:false.

on-disk corpora exist ONLY for curl,harfbuzz,openthread,sqlite3 -> harfbuzz_6010 IS corpus-measurable. The branch's non-discriminability is a TRUE no-built-test outcome, NOT a missing-corpus artifact; do not relabel as missing-server.

__WL_ has NO plain cmplog/naive decisive arm (cmp,naive = '_'); the involved W/L are value_profile (winner) vs value_profile_cmplog (loser). H1 corpus_size_ratio is run with the I2S-burdened LOSER as the inflating 'winner' arm (value_profile_cmplog) vs the unburdened value_profile baseline. H2 joint_necessity uses analyze_pair(W=value_profile, L=value_profile_cmplog); H3 operand_enrichment scores the same vp-vs-vpc corpus pair. All are existing entry points; no code change.

the codepoint operands are NOT fixed-offset scalar literals (dispersed_multibyte, variable glyph index) -> the R0 value_distance_reached scalar-distance descriptor stays DROPPED. depth_reach is G2-tautological here (W/L seeds are the resolve label) and stays REJECTED. R1's content channel + R3's corpus-scale channel are retained but already nulled; no untried built tool yields a G2-independent, G1-discriminating reading of the I2S-churn mechanism.
notes:
SINGLETON shape (1 branch: harfbuzz/6010, hb-ot-shaper-vowel-constraints.cc:68, nested switch on buffer->cur(1).codepoint over the Devanagari case constants 0x0946/0x0949/0x094A/0x094B, gated under a preceding 0x0905). TERMINAL ROUND-4 (loop-until-dry): no new discriminating built measurement remains -> this branch resolves to fallback:inconclusive, an honest G3 outcome.

PRIORS KEPT (superset / monotonic): all three round-3 hypotheses retained VERBATIM in rank 1-3 (H1 vpc_i2s_inflates_homogenizes_corpus, H2 vp_admits_token_richer_codepoint_assembly, H3 vp_enriches_codepoint_operand_bytes). Their empirical outcomes are now annotated in-line in each prediction (H1: size held ~2.9x but entropy clause nulled -> rule_not_met; H2/H3: content nulled in R1). No threshold was relaxed and no prior was dropped, so any future confirmed branch in this shape re-validates against the same rules.

NEW MECHANISM CONSIDERED + REJECTED (G1 novelty attempted, G2 failed): vp_drives_codepoint_switch_deeper_per_seed via the only built tool not yet applied here (depth_reach). It is REJECTED, not scored, because on this gate the winner-RESOLVING vs loser-BLOCKING seed sets ARE the resolve label for branch line 68, so depth_reach's winner_deeper/true-side signal is TAUTOLOGICAL with the shape-defining resolve pattern (_,W,L,_) -- a direct G2 violation ('verifying vp-resolves with vp-resolves'). depth_reach's legitimate applies_to is the ctx/ngram iteration-DEPTH subtype (more loop iterations of one structure), not a one-shot codepoint-pair-assembly switch. Recorded under undecidable with decidable:false + the G2 rationale.

WHY HONEST INCONCLUSIVE IS CORRECT (G3): four channels are now empirically closed for this branch -- scalar value-distance (R0 UNMEASURABLE: assembly/co-location gate, not scalar literal compare), corpus CONTENT (R1 nulled: tokens + codepoint bytes roughly equal), corpus byte-SCALE/entropy (R3: inflation real but entropy not homogenized -> rule_not_met), and per-seed branch DEPTH (R4: depth_reach G2-tautological, rejected). The signature's real residual mechanism -- the PER-EXECUTION I2S overhead/churn RATE that degrades the shared gradient -- is forbidden by data_realities (I2S untagged in mutation_op; value_profile a feedback invisible in lineage). There is no G2-independent, G1-discriminating built measurement left, so forcing a label would be inventing a mechanism the data cannot support. The branch correctly falls to fallback:inconclusive; this is a deliberate, honest no-clean-test verdict, not a coverage gap to chase.
